entries.contentHtml:
ABOUT US

Focus on Industrial and Commercial Laundry Equipment over 15 years

Company Profile

Brief Introduction

Wuxi Sharing Machinery Co., Ltd located in East China, 100km away from Shanghai, specializes in manufacturing and selling China’s best quality commercial and industrial laundry equipment, including washer extractors, tumble dryers, flatwork ironers, folders, dry cleaning machines, laundry press machine, and finishing equipment, etc.

We are acknowledged as a leading supplier in the field of industrial and commercial laundry equipment in China now. In the past 15 years, We have established long-term and mutually beneficial relationships with our customers at home and abroad.

Sharing’s laundry equipment is popular with customers at home and abroad, we always commit to continuing innovation & improvement, providing high-quality machines, professional & sincere service and competitive prices.

Why Choose Us

Expert Engineers

Experience Skills​

Affordable Costs

Guarantee Services​

Trusted Work​

After Sale Service

Company Culture

Our Mission

To become the preferred supplier and first call for our customers, recognized for delivering innovative solutions and inspiration through our laundry equipment, service and relationships. To conduct business through trust, professionalism and innovation, based on our organization’s ideals, values and philosophies, which we strive to achieve through the below.

Responsibility

We care about our staff, we aim to provide an enjoyable, healthy and safe environment for all team members.
Our priority is to build strong and trusted relationships with customers and suppliers based on ethical business practices and deliver on our promises. We strive to protect our fragile environment by conducting the best practices in all areas of our business.

Innovation

Innovation is vitally important for our business. It is at the center of who we are and what we do. Through innovation, we will continue to find efficient business solutions and better manufacturing methods for our customers.

Excellence

We are committed to achieving shared goals based on open and honest communication.
We enjoy what we do, we take pride in our job, products and vision.
We constantly seek to meet and exceed the highest expectations of our employees, customers and suppliers by establishing and communicating clear expectations.

Integrity

We are focused on achieving the advantage of honest and loyal actions, as individuals and as an organization, without compromise. We strive to uphold the highest professional standards, thereby earning and maintaining the trust and respect of all company stakeholders.

entries.contentHtml:
Support

We are here with you every step of the way

Sharing’s customer service support including pre-sales and after-sales service support,made up by experienced technical staff,is able to assist every customer with detailed requirements or problems.

Pre-Sales Service Support

Sharing’s Pre-sales service support department will work directly with you to determine your needs,knowing that the correct type and degree of agitation is a crucial factor in almost every processing operation.

These close customer relationships ensure that our products are manufactured to meet exact requirements for each specific application.

Engineering staff take into consideration the capacity,size and budgets,etc.Then they select from a vast range of options to provide the best choice in solutions for the application type and the size of the agitating unit required for the job.

After-Sales Service Support

Sharing’s After-sales service support department will provide the following services:

  1. Spare parts for every piece of equipment with interchangeability guarantee and best delivery time.
  2. Technical assistance or supervision on-site during the installation, maintenance, commissioning and start-up phases.
  3. Customized maintenance programs (Periodic or as-required maintenance, during and after the warranty period).
  4. Each service task is documented in our equipment records. This way the current condition and life cycle can always be displayed and analyzed. This service is free of charge for the owner of a Sharing’s laundry equipment.

entries.title: Chest Flatwork Ironer
entries.description: Our chest flatwork ironer is high efficiency, energy saving, stability and easy maintenance. It is mainly for central laundry factory and five start hotels.
entries.excerpt: Transmission System 1, Efficient: Large angle of heating groove arc surface, large heating area, high-efficiency thermal transmission, ironing speed can reach 50 meters/minute. 2, Energy-saving: The variable frequency sp...
entries.contentHtml:
Transmission System

1, Efficient: Large angle of heating groove arc surface, large heating area, high-efficiency thermal transmission, ironing speed can reach 50 meters/minute.

2, Energy-saving: The variable frequency speed adjustment system, according to the gearic levelless speed adjustment, saving more than 40% of the power, the groove -in heating cover, effectively prevent the loss of heat, cooperates with the independent air ventilation system and efficient drainage system. Make sure that the groove is dry and iron the fabric quickly.

3, Stability: Focusing on high quality, with high quality materials, durable and stable quality.

4, Easy maintenance: The fully automatic computer controller has an intelligent fault alarm and detection system, which is convenient for maintenance; the steam pressure and low temperature protection system ensures the best fit between the roller and the groove, reduces the wear of consumables, and prolongs the service life of the ironing felt , making maintenance easier and reducing maintenance time.

Channel System

1, Sturdy and durable, high rate of return: The unique process technology ensures that the heating tank has good resistance to equipment pressure and thermal expansion. The thoughtful design keeps the stored heat for a longer time and saves precious energy during startup and shutdown.

2, Imported spring: Stable elasticity, the service life can be as long as 25 years under normal use, and the spring force can be automatically adjusted according to different fabrics to achieve the best ironing quality and reduce resource waste and maintenance costs.

3, Reduction system: Imported planetary reducer, better material, more refined workmanship, reliable quality, high efficiency, large output torque, compact structure, strong impact resistance, stable operation and low noise.

4, Drainage system: British Spiraxsarco steam traps, all float traps are unique self-correcting main valves, anti-hammer combination and anti-corrosion air exhaust valve, this design ensures that the main valve can be tight under any pressure shut down, prolonging the life of the equipment and reducing maintenance.

5, Technology improves control: large-screen LCD touch intelligent system, easy to operate, with 10 sets of automatic programs for customers to write by themselves to meet different linen needs; computer controller is equipped with fault self-diagnosis and alarm functions, easy maintenance.

entries.title: Dry Cleaning Machine
entries.description: Fully auotmatic and fully closed dry cleaning machine with completed stainless steel 304 structure, double filtration system, 3 solvent tanks.
entries.excerpt: 1,Full automatic computer control system with manual control. Programmable computer with self-diagnostics function. Big LCD display screen. Intelligent operation. 2,High standard production line by mould ensures stronger...
entries.contentHtml:
1,Full automatic computer control system with manual control. Programmable computer with self-diagnostics function. Big LCD display screen. Intelligent operation.
2,High standard production line by mould ensures stronger parts and makes the part replacement easier.
3,Completed stainless steel structure. All the components contact with solvent such as basket, basket housing, air channel, filter, button trap, water separators, still, and SOLVENT TANKS are all made of SS304. Solvent pipeline material is optional in stainless steel.
4,The inverter, low voltage apparatus, and pneumatic system are all world famous brands.
5,A world advanced air channel structure ensures high air flow and faster recycles speed, to save drying time and make the lint collect thorough and clean.
6,Double filtration system consists of one ecological filter and one newly designed and patented active carbon filter which doesn’t need to be cleaned with dry cleaning filtration powder and carbon powder. It achieves free maintenance for filter, high cleanness, and less running cost. Besides, it brings unparalleled effect for cleaning the light color garment.
7,Self-cleaning function for 3 solvent tanks.
8,The heat during still is recycled when they come into the drying air channel, which save energy and improve work efficiency; the still is equipped with automatic level control device for safety concern.
9,Equipped various safety protection devices, such as pneumatic safety door lock device for loading door, lint collector, still tank residual solvent drainage door, and button trap.
10,Siemens high-performance frequency controlled motor – more powerful, reliable and durable.
11,High performance and fully closed refrigeration recycle system with Danfoss scroll compressor optimizes the recovery efficiency.
12,NSK bearings for main shaft and filters; CCVI or DuPont brand Viton seal. The main shaft adopts world advantaged technology of free maintenance; never need to fill in oil to the bearing and oil seal.
13,Equipped with automatic dosing device for liquid soap and detergent agent.
14,European standard solvent leak-proof tank prevents solvent leaking to contaminate the laundry and underground water, and meanwhile it can recycle the solvent.
15,Equipped secondary water separator for the solvent and water.
16,Equipped with world advanced dual refrigeration system with Freon, it achieves adjustable solvent temperature to meet the dry cleaning requirements of leather and other fabrics of garment. (Optional)

entries.title: Barrier Washer Extractor
entries.description: The barrier washer extractor adopts a double-door structure, loading dirty linens and unloading clean linens seperately, avoiding cross-contamination.
entries.excerpt: 1. The barrier washing machine adopts a double-door structure to entry and exit, and the laundry room is divided into a low-level area and a high-level area through a partition wall. In the low-level area, loading clothe...
entries.contentHtml:
1. The barrier washing machine adopts a double-door structure to entry and exit, and the laundry room is divided into a low-level area and a high-level area through a partition wall. In the low-level area, loading clothes and washing operations, and in the high-level area, unloading clothes and arrange packaging, effectively avoiding cross-contamination of clean room cleanliness.

2. The whole structure of the washing machine adopts a closed type, which isolates the air from the low-level area into the high-level area through the partition wall to ensure a good cleanliness level of the clean room.

3. All water bath parts such as inner drum, outer drum, water inlet valve, steam inlet valve, drain valve, shell panel, etc. are made of 304 stainless steel, all of which are welded by argon arc, which is resistant to acid and alkali, and has good corrosion resistance.

4. The washing drum adopts the dual treatment of manual grinding and electrolytic polishing, the surface is smooth, and no snagging phenomenon occurs.

5. It adopts Japan Yaskawa inverter, USA TWB bearings, food-grade high temperature grease, Sweden Forsheda sealing ring, etc., with strong corrosion resistance, good wear resistance, and good lubrication and waterproof sealing measures.

6. The machine is damped by German Continental airbags, no special foundation is required.

7. The computer automatic control system is a touch LCD display, which can display multiple lines of text. It uses Intel chips and has 49 sets of automatic washing programs. It can be printed for each washing process, or it can be copied out through a U disk and stored in an office computer. Programmable controller (PLC) can be selected according to user requirements.

8. The washing drum is installed horizontally, supported on both sides, running smoothly and durable. Use a peristaltic pump to automatically add liquid detergent.
entries.plainText: 1. The barrier washing machine adopts a double-door structure to entry and exit, and the laundry room is divided into a low-level area and a high-level area through a partition wall. In the low-level area, loading clothes and washing operations, and in the high-level area, unloading clothes and arrange packaging, effectively avoiding cross-contamination of clean room cleanliness. 2. The whole structure of the washing machine adopts a closed type, which isolates the air from the low-level area into the high-level area through the partition wall to ensure a good cleanliness level of the clean room. 3. All water bath parts such as inner drum, outer drum, water inlet valve, steam inlet valve, drain valve, shell panel, etc. are made of 304 stainless steel, all of which are welded by argon arc, which is resistant to acid and alkali, and has good corrosion resistance. 4. The washing drum adopts the dual treatment of manual grinding and electrolytic polishing, the surface is smooth, and no snagging phenomenon occurs. 5. It adopts Japan Yaskawa inverter, USA TWB bearings, food-grade high temperature grease, Sweden Forsheda sealing ring, etc., with strong corrosion resistance, good wear resistance, and good lubrication and waterproof sealing measures. 6. The machine is damped by German Continental airbags, no special foundation is required. 7. The computer automatic control system is a touch LCD display, which can display multiple lines of text. It uses Intel chips and has 49 sets of automatic washing programs. It can be printed for each washing process, or it can be copied out through a U disk and stored in an office computer. Programmable controller (PLC) can be selected according to user requirements. 8. The washing drum is installed horizontally, supported on both sides, running smoothly and durable. Use a peristaltic pump to automatically add liquid detergent.

entries.contentHtml:
1. Our tilting washer extractor is soft mount and integrates mature laundry equipment technology, high-quality materials, and excellent workmanship to ensure the overall performance of the equipment.

2. Airbag lifting structure, equipped with position detection and self-locking device, convenient and reliable to use.

3. additional positive and negative jog buttons to ensure the safety of operators.

4. Reasonable forward tilt angle and large size door, to ensure that the discharge is completed within 30 seconds.

5. The drum adopts the flat hole process, the density is high, and the V-shaped ribs adopt the punching design at the same time, which greatly improves the washing degree of the cloth.

6. High anti-corrosion performance, the outer cylinder and water contact part are made of high-quality stainless steel, and the service life are longer.

7. Low-frequency all-steel weight design, better shock absorption effect, no need for special foundation, easy to install.

8. Soap tank with 5 detergent separators, unique tilt stainless steel soap door to avoid material leakage.

9. High eccentric load accelerated life test, to ensure that the structural parts of the equipment have a long life and a longer service life.

10. Narrow-shaped sink design, effectively reduce the volume of invalid water, while saving chemical materials, more energy efficient.

11.300G dehydration force, standard two-way water, effectively reduces the water and drying time, more efficient.

12. Anti-offset ability, high drying success rate, effectively reducing the repetition time, more time-saving.

13. Comprehensive safety control, pressure water level detection, and improve work reliability.

14. Germany imported V-type seals and other high-quality devices to further improve equipment stability.

15. Multi-function microcomputer processing controller, 30 sets of editable programs, full-featured, and provide software upgrades and USB functions.

entries.description: Fully automatic washer extractor is soft mounted type, high spin, all the mould processing for inner and outer drums, good outlooks.
entries.excerpt: Adopt advanced programmable microcomputer control system, large screen display, realize Chinese man-machine dialogue, can automatically and independently complete functions such as adding water, heating, washing, adding ...
entries.contentHtml:
1. Adopt advanced programmable microcomputer control system, large screen display, realize Chinese man-machine dialogue, can automatically and independently complete functions such as adding water, heating, washing, adding agent, uniform cloth, and de-drying, and realize various fault self-checks and operation prompts.
  2. The new shock absorption, shock absorption and shock absorption system are adopted, and multiple connection points are set between the outer frame and the inner body, which effectively prevents the unbalanced vibration in all directions when drying out; the equipment does not need special foundation fixing at all, with high shock absorption rate and low noise.
  3. It adopts full frequency conversion stepless speed regulation control, which can meet the requirements of rapid linear increase and conversion of rotational speed, and can achieve the required drying rate arbitrarily.
  4. Unique design of computer dosing system, all auxiliary materials are added at one time, computer execution, reasonable integration of hot and cold washing and de-drying, high cleaning degree, so that the whole machine has complete functions and excellent performance.
  5. Bearings and shaft seals are imported well-known brands, and the door seals are made of temperature-resistant and corrosion-resistant fluororubber sealing rings, which solves the problem of water leakage when the equipment is in use, and makes the laundry room clean and tidy.
  6. The inner and outer drums are made of imported high-quality mirror stainless steel, which has strong corrosion resistance and smooth drum wall, ensuring that no stains remain in the drum, and effectively preventing the secondary pollution of the fabric.
  7. The moulding level is high, and the inner drum adopts the advanced European non-marking spinning technology to form at one time, no welding, higher strength, durability, beautiful atmosphere, and the domestic water washing machine that realizes the application of non-marking spinning and non-welding forming technology.
  8. The large-diameter loading door is more convenient and labor-saving to throw clothes, and is equipped with a safety door lock, which can be controlled manually or automatically.
  9. The frequency converter, control system electrical components, shock absorber damper, drain valve and other components are all world or domestic famous brands to ensure stable and reliable performance of the equipment and durability.

entries.title: Automatic Feeder
entries.description: Automatic feeder can improve the feeding efficiency, making the linens more flatable after ironing, saving labour intensity.
entries.excerpt: Adopt Japanese Mitsubishi PLC control system, 10-inch high-definition touch screen, store more than 20 kinds of programs and more than 100 customer information. The uniquely developed control system, after continuous opt...
entries.contentHtml:
1. Adopt Japanese Mitsubishi PLC control system, 10-inch high-definition touch screen, store more than 20 kinds of programs and more than 100 customer information.
  2. The uniquely developed control system, after continuous optimization and upgrading, is mature and stable, the interface design is simple and easy to operate, and it can support multiple languages. The control system is equipped with Internet functions such as remote fault diagnosis, troubleshooting, and program upgrade.
  3. Each station has the function of input quantity statistics, which can accurately measure the quantity of linen fed, which is convenient for operators to manage.
  4. Unique air duct structure design, flapping the cloth sucked into the air duct to improve the smoothness of the linen transport. The oversized bed linen can be smoothly sucked into the air duct, and the maximum bed sheet size is 3300x3500mm.
  5. 3 stations, or 4 stations synchronous transmission function, each station has two sets of cloth feeding manipulators, high work efficiency. Each group of feeding station is designed with loading waiting position, which makes the feeding action compact, reduces waiting time, and improves the efficiency of the whole machine.
  6. Designed with manual feeding function, it can realize manual feeding of bed linen, quilt cover, table cloth, pillowcase and other small linens.
  7. There are 2 smoothing functions, mechanical knife smoothing design, brush smoothing design, anti-clothing function.
  8. The guide rail mold is extruded and has high precision. The surface is treated with a special wear-resistant process. The cloth clips run smoothly on the track and the speed is fast.
  9. The frame structure of the machine is integrally welded, and each long shaft has been precisely processed.
  10. The shuttle board is controlled by a servo motor, with high accuracy and fast speed. Not only the bed sheet is transported at high speed, but also the quilt cover can be transported at low speed.
  11. The conveying speed can reach up to 60 meters per minute, and can convey up to 1200 sheets per hour.
  12. All electrical, pneumatic, bearing, motor and other components are imported from Japan and Europe.

entries.contentHtml:
1. Using Mitsubishi PLC and touch screen, to achieve Chinese and English man-machine dialogue interface, easy to understand, easy to operate. High reliability, long life, easy to query and use methods.

  3. The high-strength frame integral welding guarantees the reliability and high performance of the whole machine.
  4. The use of enlarged seat bearings facilitates maintenance and greatly improves bearing life.
  5. Adopting sprocket drive, the transmission has high precision and long service life, and it is maintenance-free.
  6. Equipped with two sets of emergency folding function system: if the touch screen is faulty or damaged, it can also have a set of emergency five fold/two fold function, If the PLC controller is faulty or damaged, the folding machine can still be operated without folding.
  7. Professional millimeter length measuring and speed measuring device ensures accurate folding.
  8. High-quality anti-static belt and elastic belt to ensure folding effect and extend the life of the belt.
  9. Discriminating with folding range, cross folding, wide folding, protection and alarm to ensure high quality folding effect.
  10. Realize linkage with the speed of the ironing machine to achieve stepless speed regulation.
  11. The dirty cloth detection function is realized. When the cloth is placed, the cloth is dirty. Just press the button, and the folding machine automatically retreats to the table after completing the second vertical folding.
  12. Has astuck linen alarm function and stops.
  13. Efficient removal of static bars to effectively remove static electricity.
  14. Safety guard, internal interlock and emergency stop to ensure safe operation.
  15. Independent ground terminal to avoid interference.

entries.title: Commercial Washing Machine

entries.contentHtml:
1, Commercial laundry washing machine is high spin soft mount type. With the multi directional springs system, the machine can absorb 97% of all vibrations. Ensure the stability when the extract speed reaches up to max.350G.

2, All metallic parts that come into contact with water are in AISI304. Including inner drum, outer drum and panels, etc. 80% above parts are processed by molds, the inner and outer drum is processed by laser.Achieve compact design, light but robust structure, maximize the durability and longevity.

3, All the electric elements such as frequency converter are world well-known brand. It has very good performance even in hot and humid environment.Significant reduction in noise, vibration, and fatigue of the washing machine components.

4, The washers are able to quietly and gently reach extract speed up to Max. 350G. This feature benefits the laundries with less operation time, less drying-time which brings lower energy consumption and labor expense.

5, Large diameter basket with multiple ribs produces better mechanical wash action for optimum wash quality with less detergent.

6, Single motor inverter drive allows programmable right wash speed for wide variety of fabrics. the inverter controlled motor and the matched controller programs enable the extract speed reach up to 350G

7, 5 automatic detergent cups turn over and flush all detergents thoroughly into the basket, no remaining lump in cups.

8, Thanks to the independent suspension system, the washers can be installed on any normal and unconventional locations with zero impact on the floor or ground.

1, The volume is large, the amount of clothes is large, and the drying speed is fast.

2, Large-diameter loading door, the door opening amplitude is large, up to 180 ̊, easy to take clothes, easy to operate, easy to maintain.

3, Using automatic temperature control device to ensure that the clothes are dried at a constant temperature according to the selected temperature, which can win more benefits for the user.

5, Computer automatic control, precise setting of running time, temperature, for five sets of automatic program selection, fault information detection, and with alarm function, making the machine run more reliable and safe.

6, Large blade fan, to ensure that the fan is not blocked by plush. Large-scale plush collection net for easy cleaning of plush.

entries.title: Coin Operated Washing Machine
entries.description: 12kg, 15kg, 20kg, 25kg coin operated washing machine is mainly for self service laundry shops, high efficient and durable.
entries.excerpt: 1. The inner and outer drums of our coin-operated washing machine are all imported mirror stainless steel. The inner cage adopts the internationally advanced seamless spinning process, with no welding, the first in China...
entries.contentHtml:
1. The inner and outer drums of our coin-operated washing machine are all imported mirror stainless steel. The inner cage adopts the internationally advanced seamless spinning process, with no welding, the first in China, the strength is doubled, and it is durable.

2. Alloy material pulley, light and beautiful, super high strength. The grooveless V-ribbed belt design is more than several times the life of ordinary belts.

3. FMS suspension damping system, without any fixed, ultra-low vibration.

4. High quality Japan NSK bearings and shaft seals, longer service life.

5. The inner and outer drum gap is small, and heating and heating speed is fast, saving water and electricity.

6. The frequency conversion speed control can meet the speed’s linear climb and high-speed requirements, low noise and good stability.

7. The pipeline connection adopts the soft contact of imported anti-corrosion rubber from South Korea, which has small vibration, strong stability and doubled life.

8. The cage door is large, and it is easy to load clothes.

9. High-quality stainless steel heating tube, ring attached to the wall of the barrel, fast heat transfer, long service life.

10. Advanced drainage control system, accurate and easy to operate.

entries.contentHtml:
Category: Company News

1*40HC Laundry Machines’ Loading to the Saudi Arabia

On June 25th, We loaded 1*40HC container’s of 50kg washers, 50kg dryers and 2 rollers ironer to to one old customer in Damman, Saudi Arabia this morning.

2*40ft containers’ laundry machines to France

On May 19, We deliveried 2*40ft containers laundry equipments to our France customer.

1*40ft container laundry machines to London,UK

On May 18, We deliveried 1*40ft container laundry equipments to our customer in London,UK.

3x40ft containers to be loaded to Saudi Arabia

We just loaded laundry machines into 3x40ft containers to another customer in Saudi Arabia today

1*40HC Laundry Machines’ Loading to the Spain

On March 27, We deliveried 1*40HC container of laundry machines ,including washers dryers to the old customer in Spain.

3 Machines’Pick up to the Italy

On March 22nd, the forwarder arranged the 3 sets of laundry machines’s pick up to Shanghai port then to ship to the Italy.

Single Roller 3000mm Flatwork Ironer to Saudi Arabia

On March 15, we deliveried one set of single roller 3000mm flatwork ironer to our Saudi Arabia customer .

3 Rollers 3000mm Flatwork Ironers deliveried to Domestic Customer

On March 14, We deliveried 3 rollers 3000mm Flatwork Ironers to our domestic customer.

Two Stacked Washer Dryer were deliveried to the Philippines

On March 12, we deliveried two stacked washer dryers to Yiwu then to ship to the Philippines.

1*40HC Laundry Machines’ Loading to the Turkey

On Jan 18th, We loaded 1*40HC container’s laundry machines to the Turkey.
